briefdescription.para: Get Transmit (Tx) Ring ptr.

detaileddescription.para: Warning: This has a different API than the LLDMA driver. It now returns the pointer to the BD ring.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DMA engine instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: XAxiDma_BdRing * XAxiDma_GetTxRing(XAxiDma * InstancePtr) This function is used only when system is configured as SG mode

briefdescription.para: Get Receive (Rx) Ring ptr.

detaileddescription.para: Warning: This has a different API than the LLDMA driver. It now returns the pointer to the BD ring.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DMA engine instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: XAxiDma_BdRing * XAxiDma_GetRxRing(XAxiDma * InstancePtr) This function is used only when system is configured as SG mode

briefdescription.para: Get Receive (Rx) Ring ptr of a Index.

detaileddescription.para: Warning: This has a different API than the LLDMA driver. It now returns the pointer to the BD ring.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DMA engine instance to be worked on.
is the channel Index.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: XAxiDma_BdRing * XAxiDma_GetRxIndexRing(XAxiDma * InstancePtr, int RingIndex) This function is used only when system is configured as SG mode

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether system is configured as Simple or Scatter Gather mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DMA engine instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: TRUE if configured as SG mode
FALSE if configured as simple mode

memberdef.name: XAxiDma_IntrEnable
memberdef.initializer: XAxiDma_WriteReg((InstancePtr)->RegBase + \ (XAXIDMA_RX_OFFSET * Direction), XAXIDMA_CR_OFFSET, \ (XAxiDma_ReadReg((InstancePtr)->RegBase + \ (XAXIDMA_RX_OFFSET * Direction), XAXIDMA_CR_OFFSET)) \ | (Mask & XAXIDMA_IRQ_ALL_MASK))

briefdescription.para: This function enables interrupts specified by the Mask in specified direction, Interrupts that are not in the mask are not affected.

parameterdescription.para: is the driver instance we are working on
is the mask for the interrupts to be enabled

is DMA transfer direction, valid values are
XAXIDMA_DMA_TO_DEVICE.
XAXIDMA_DEVICE_TO_DMA.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the mask for the interrupts that are currently enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is the driver instance we are working on

is DMA transfer direction, valid values are
XAXIDMA_DMA_TO_DEVICE.
XAXIDMA_DEVICE_TO_DMA.

simplesect.para: The bit mask for the interrupts that are currently enabled

memberdef.name: XAxiDma_IntrDisable
memberdef.initializer: XAxiDma_WriteReg((InstancePtr)->RegBase + \ (XAXIDMA_RX_OFFSET * Direction), XAXIDMA_CR_OFFSET, \ (XAxiDma_ReadReg((InstancePtr)->RegBase + \ (XAXIDMA_RX_OFFSET * Direction), XAXIDMA_CR_OFFSET)) \ & ~(Mask & XAXIDMA_IRQ_ALL_MASK))

briefdescription.para: This function disables interrupts specified by the Mask.

detaileddescription.para: Interrupts that are not in the mask are not affected.

parameterdescription.para: is the driver instance we are working on
is the mask for the interrupts to be disabled

is DMA transfer direction, valid values are
XAXIDMA_DMA_TO_DEVICE.
XAXIDMA_DEVICE_TO_DMA.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the interrupts that are asserted.

parameterdescription.para: is the driver instance we are working on

is DMA transfer direction, valid values are
XAXIDMA_DMA_TO_DEVICE.
XAXIDMA_DEVICE_TO_DMA.

simplesect.para: The bit mask for the interrupts asserted.

briefdescription.para: This function acknowledges the interrupts that are specified in Mask.

parameterdescription.para: is the driver instance we are working on
is the mask for the interrupts to be acknowledge

is DMA transfer direction, valid values are
XAXIDMA_DMA_TO_DEVICE.
XAXIDMA_DEVICE_TO_DMA.

briefdescription.para: The XAxiDma driver instance data.

detaileddescription.para: An instance must be allocated for each DMA engine in use.

briefdescription.para: Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID/BaseAddress.

detaileddescription.para: A table contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration table entry corresponding to the given device ID/BaseAddress, or NULL if no match is found.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a DMA engine.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using a DMA engine. Initializing a engine includes setting up the register base address, setting up the instance data, and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DMA engine instance to be worked on.

is a pointer to an XAxiDma_Config structure. It contains the information about the hardware build, including base address,and whether status control stream (StsCntrlStrm), MM2S and S2MM are included in the build.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM if pointer to the configuration structure is NULL
XST_DMA_ERROR if reset operation failed at the end of initialization

simplesect.para: We assume the hardware building tool will check and error out for a hardware build that has no transfer channels.

briefdescription.para: Reset both TX and RX channels of a DMA engine.

detaileddescription.para: Reset one channel resets the whole AXI DMA engine.
Any DMA transaction in progress will finish gracefully before engine starts reset. Any other transactions that have been submitted to hardware will be discarded by the hardware.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DMA engine instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para:
After the reset:
All interrupts are disabled.
Engine is halted

briefdescription.para: Check whether reset is done.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DMA engine instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Pause DMA transactions on both channels.

detaileddescription.para: If the engine is running and doing transfers, this function does not stop the DMA transactions immediately, because then hardware will throw away our previously queued transfers. All submitted transfers will finish. Transfers submitted after this function will not start until XAxiDma_BdRingStart() or XAxiDma_Resume() is called.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DMA engine instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_NOT_SGDMA, if the driver instance is not initialized

briefdescription.para: Resume DMA transactions on both channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the DMA engine instance to be worked on.

listitem.para: XST_NOT_SGDMA if the driver instance has not been initialized
XST_DMA_ERROR if one of the channels fails to start

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether specified DMA channel is busy.

parameterdescription.para: is the driver instance we are working on

is DMA transfer direction, valid values are
XAXIDMA_DMA_TO_DEVICE.
XAXIDMA_DEVICE_TO_DMA.

simplesect.para:
- TRUE if channel is busy
FALSE if channel is idle

memberdef.argsstring: (XAxiDma *InstancePtr, UINTPTR BuffAddr, u32 Length, int Direction)
memberdef.name: XAxiDma_SimpleTransfer

briefdescription.para: This function does one simple transfer submission.

detaileddescription.para:
It checks in the following sequence:
if engine is busy, cannot submit
if engine is in SG mode , cannot submit

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the driver instance
is the address of the source/destination buffer
is the length of the transfer

is DMA transfer direction, valid values are
XAXIDMA_DMA_TO_DEVICE.
XAXIDMA_DEVICE_TO_DMA.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE for submission failure, maybe caused by: Another simple transfer is still going
XST_INVALID_PARAM if:Length out of valid range [1:8M] Or, address not aligned when DRE is not built in

simplesect.para: This function is used only when system is configured as Simple mode.

briefdescription.para: This function Enable or Disable KeyHole Feature.

parameterdescription.para: is the driver instance we are working on

is DMA transfer direction, valid values are
XAXIDMA_DMA_TO_DEVICE.
XAXIDMA_DEVICE_TO_DMA.
is the option to enable (TRUE) or disable (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function Enable or Disable Cyclic Mode Feature.

parameterdescription.para: is the driver instance we are working on

is DMA transfer direction, valid values are
XAXIDMA_DMA_TO_DEVICE.
XAXIDMA_DEVICE_TO_DMA.
is the option to enable (TRUE) or disable (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: Runs a self-test on the driver/device.

detaileddescription.para: This test perform a reset of the DMA device and checks the device is coming out of reset or not

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxiDma instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the device is not coming out of reset.
